description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 26, 2025 at 10:55 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Harrison Street near 11th Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was parked facing southwest at the north curb on Harrison Street in autonomous mode with its hazard lights activated in 
between a passenger car parked in front and an SUV parked directly behind the Waymo AV. A driver from Waymo roadside assistance 
entered the vehicle and transitioned the Waymo AV to manual mode. The driver reversed, and the rear of the Waymo AV made contact with 
the front of an SUV that was parked directly behind the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was not 
engaged and a driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
